rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the premature Layer-5/6 True-stub classes as a scope problem, but Review 2 more usefully distinguishes the legitimate Layer-0 foundations (AffineAlgGroup/AlgPoints) from the out-of-scope endpoints and recommends splitting them, whereas Review 1's claim about AffineAlgGroup 'bundling' depends on an unverifiable roadmap citation and is less clearly a scope issue.
